title: aegopogon breviglumis
intro: Aegopogon breviglumis, also known as the tall umbrella grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aegopogon breviglumis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and relieve digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Aegopogon breviglumis include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or mixing with other herbs to create a topical application.
